summary: A conservative, authoritative marketing site for Halloran Voss LLP, a boutique corporate law firm advising founders and mid-market companies on M&A, IP, and venture financing.

pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Brand hero, stats, practice preview, matters, attorneys, and conversion CTA.

pages.title: The Firm
pages.purpose: Origin story, principles, who-we-serve, and firm FAQs.

pages.title: Practices
pages.purpose: Detailed M&A, IP, and venture financing practice areas with representative engagements.

pages.title: Attorneys
pages.purpose: Partner roster, monogram portraits, and an in-focus founding-partner profile.

pages.title: Insights
pages.purpose: Notable matters list and a library of partner-authored commentary.

pages.title: Contact
pages.purpose: Confidential consultation form, offices, hours, and engagement disclaimer.
